description:
What: New sub-arena in runtime/src/heap.rs for RC-managed objects. RC count fits in HeapHeader (reuse reserved bits if available; otherwise extend header for RC-arena objects only — accept the size cost there).

Why: Foundation for hybrid GC. Independent of DPS — DPS allocates from Cheney unless told to use this arena.

CLIF impact: no change to existing paths.

Removes: nothing.

Tests: synthetic alloc/free under stress; verify arena bookkeeping.
title: fz-dps.B1: Heap::alloc_owned sub-arena + RC header
